title: September 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 3''' is the 246th day of the year (247th in leap years). There are 119 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Tim Landry]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Kevin Kiner]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Chris Bartlett]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Robert Stambler]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars Droids: The Protocol Offensive]]'' published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 22|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 22]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Mission to Zila]]" archived at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Holocron Heist]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 1: Breakout Squad]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[Timeline 4: The Empire Changes Strategy]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 144|''Star Wars Insider'' 144]] published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars Lightsaber Thumb Wrestling]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: Attack of the Furball]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back Cinestory Comic]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 8: The Sith and the Skywalker]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: Snowy Mountain Rescue]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: The Harvest Feast]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon 1|''Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon'' 1]] published.
*2025 – [[Legacy of Vader 8|''Legacy of Vader'' 8]] published.
